mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_task (user_id, title, source_type, note_url, note_content, timezone, schedule_mode, reminder_strategy, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{sourceType}, #{noteUrl}, #{noteContent}, #{timezone}, #{scheduleMode}, #{reminderStrategy}, #{status}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, source_type AS sourceType, note_url AS noteUrl, note_content AS noteContent, timezone, schedule_mode AS scheduleMode, reminder_strategy AS reminderStrategy, status, last_reviewed_at AS lastReviewedAt, next_remind_at AS nextRemindAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM review_task WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, source_type AS sourceType, note_url AS noteUrl, note_content AS noteContent, timezone, schedule_mode AS scheduleMode, reminder_strategy AS reminderStrategy, status, last_reviewed_at AS lastReviewedAt, next_remind_at AS nextRemindAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM review_task WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE review_task SET last_reviewed_at = #{lastReviewedAt}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE review_task SET next_remind_at = #{nextRemindAt}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{taskId}
